name: formspec-site
description: Formspec documentation website built with Astro

scripts.copy:studio: rm -rf public/studio public/chat && mkdir -p public/studio public/chat && cp -r ../packages/formspec-studio/dist/* public/studio/ && mv public/studio/chat.html public/chat/index.html
scripts.copy:references: rm -rf public/references && mkdir -p public/references && cp -r ../examples/refrences/dist/* public/references/ && mkdir -p public/references/examples && cp -r ../examples/grant-application public/references/examples/ && cp -r ../examples/grant-report public/references/examples/ && cp -r ../examples/invoice public/references/examples/ && cp -r ../examples/clinical-intake public/references/examples/ && cp -r ../examples/uswds-grant public/references/examples/ && mkdir -p public/references/registries && cp ../registries/*.json public/references/registries/
scripts.copy:react-demo: rm -rf public/react && mkdir -p public/react && cp -r ../examples/react-demo/dist/* public/react/
scripts.build:uswds-grant: cd ../examples/uswds-grant && npm install --ignore-scripts 2>/dev/null; FORMSPEC_BASE_PATH=/uswds-grant/ npx vite build
scripts.copy:uswds-grant: rm -rf public/uswds-grant && mkdir -p public/uswds-grant && cp -r ../examples/uswds-grant/dist/* public/uswds-grant/
scripts.predev: npm run build:studio && npm run copy:studio && npm run build:references && npm run copy:references && npm run build:react-demo && npm run copy:react-demo && npm run build:uswds-grant && npm run copy:uswds-grant && npm run build:mcpb && npm run copy:mcpb
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:studio && npm run copy:studio && npm run build:references && npm run copy:references && npm run build:react-demo && npm run copy:react-demo && npm run build:uswds-grant && npm run copy:uswds-grant && npm run build:mcpb && npm run copy:mcpb
